description: Hand-authored KPI dictionary for the sales_sample gallery example. It labels the numeric measures and supplies the two optional x-qsv KPI hints so `viz smart --dictionary` renders GAUGE and DELTA tiles in the overview row: `gauge_range` [min,max] draws a measure on a canonical scale (here the 0-1 ratios), and `target` draws a "vs target" delta. NOT LLM-generated — `target` is a business GOAL you choose (describegpt never emits it); `gauge_range` is what `--dictionary infer` would emit for these ratios. Columns omitted here fall back to qsv's statistical heuristic.
